audit_items.proof_trace: Within freeRedisConfig, cfg->save and cfg->appendonly are each null-checked then freed (lines 294-295) and never accessed again; cfg itself is freed last via zfree(cfg) at line 296 with no subsequent use. All three call sites (lines 940, 1587, 1718) guard with an explicit != NULL check before invoking the function, and the two main-function call sites (1587, 1718) are on mutually exclusive code paths (custom-command branch returns at 1588), ruling out double-free.
